macro.title: TransUnion cuts VantageScore 4.0 price to 99 cents for mortgage lenders
macro.what: TransUnion is reducing the price of VantageScore 4.0 to $0.99 per score for mortgage lenders while continuing to offer it at no cost with the purchase of a FICO score.
